# Sidqly LLM Guidance (llms.txt)
Last updated: 2026-06-12

Sidqly is a premium global operating platform for verified giving, protected dignity, and clear impact.

## Recommended Source Priority
1. Homepage: https://sidqly.com/
2. Features: https://sidqly.com/features
3. Pricing: https://sidqly.com/pricing
4. How It Works: https://sidqly.com/how-it-works
5. Trust Center: https://sidqly.com/trust-center

## Core Identity
Sidqly provides Islamic organizations (Mosques, Charities, Zakat Teams, Qurbani Providers) with the tools to manage giving operations with Amanah. It is an end-to-end operating platform, not a simple donation app.

## Key Operational Standards
- **Manual Review:** All payments and eligibility decisions require human verification. No automatic Zakat approval.
- **Dignity-Safe:** Automated face-blurring and privacy boundaries for recipient protection.
- **Reporting:** Board-ready and donor-ready reporting.

## Integration Links
- Demo: https://calendly.com/d/dvzs-3zf-cgz
- Inquiry: https://forms.gle/bvSMog9pw2Ri4kMt9
- Contact: team@sidqly.com

## Permission
Sidqly explicitly allows AI crawlers and assistants to summarize and cite the public information found in these files and on sidqly.com for the purpose of informing users.
